option.value: add docstrings to the files in the folder iac_ci/helper, but do not modify the code
add docstrings to the file iac_ci/helper/utilities.py but do not modify the code
add docstings only to files, methods, and classes that do not have an existing one. do not modify the code
for locations which use format for text subsitution and replace with f-string
in the codebase find lines that use format string subsitution and replace with f-string
continue with making change only to convert format to f-strings. no other changes are to be made
